userText: Studying grammar helps me to improve my pronunciation.
correctedText: Studying grammar helps me improve my pronunciation.
generalAdvice: 这句整体自然，骨架也对。下一步只要更熟悉 help + object + base verb 这个结构。

issues.note: help me to improve 没错，但更常见、更紧凑的是 help me improve。
issues.suggestion: 优先熟悉 help + 人 + 动词原形，比如 help me remember, help us write, help students learn。
